content: Gap-fill / cold-start pattern for streaming market data: treat WebSocket/SSE as a delta channel layered on a REST snapshot, never as sole source of truth. On (re)connect: 1) fetch current snapshot via REST, 2) subscribe to stream, 3) apply deltas on top of snapshot, ignoring deltas older than snapshot timestamp. Reconnect with exponential backoff + jitter (base * 2^attempt + random(), capped at 30-60s). Buffer last N messages server-side with TTL for replay on reconnect (Last-Event-ID for SSE). For options greeks: snapshot via REST chain pull on cold-start, stream deltas for mark/greeks updates. Journal (30-min snapshots) and streaming (real-time marks) can coexist: stream provides live display, journal is written by the separate REST snapshot job — no reconciliation needed since they serve different purposes.
